# Regression

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Outcome regression

_To be added._

## Misspecified regression models

_To be added._

## Effect modification

_To be added._

## Marginal effects

_To be added._

## Interaction

_To be added._
